scripts.build: npm --workspace @ielts-pro/shared run build && npm --workspace @ielts-pro/ui run build && cd apps/student-web && node ../../node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build --webpack && cd ../admin-web && node ../../node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build --webpack
scripts.build:student: npm --workspace @ielts-pro/shared run build && npm --workspace @ielts-pro/ui run build && cd apps/student-web && node ../../node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build --webpack
scripts.build:admin: npm --workspace @ielts-pro/shared run build && npm --workspace @ielts-pro/ui run build && cd apps/admin-web && node ../../node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build --webpack
